title.en: One STA, Many MACs, Many Bands: MMSL Cluster Operation and DMG Coexistence with Non-802.11 Systems
title.zh: 一台设备、多个 MAC、多个频段：MMSL 多 MAC 子层簇操作与 DMG 与非 802.11 系统共存

blocks.en: A modern phone or laptop is rarely a single radio. The same chassis often runs a 60 GHz DMG radio alongside a sub-7 GHz Wi-Fi radio, and each radio has its own full MAC entity — its own MAC address, its own state machine. Left uncoordinated, these MACs on the same device would compete with each other as if they were strangers. 802.11 gives them a way to cooperate: an MM-SME (multiple-MAC station management entity) gathers several MAC sublayers in one STA and runs them as a coordinated team called an MMSL cluster.
blocks.zh: 现代的手机或笔记本很少只有一个射频。同一台机器里往往既有一个 60 GHz 的 DMG 射频，又有一个 sub-7 GHz 的 Wi-Fi 射频，而每个射频都拥有自己完整的 MAC 实体——各自的 MAC 地址、各自的状态机。如果不加协调，同一台设备上的这些 MAC 就会像陌生人一样互相抢占资源。802.11 给了它们协作的办法：一个 MM-SME（多 MAC 站点管理实体）把一台 STA 里的多个 MAC 子层聚拢起来，作为一个协调的整体来运行，这个整体就叫作 MMSL 簇。

blocks.en: MMSL stands for Multiple MAC Sublayers. The key tool is the MMS element: a small advertisement that lists the MAC addresses of all the MAC entities the MM-SME coordinates. A STA announces "these addresses are all me" by carrying an MMS element in its (Re)Association, ADDTS, Probe, or Information frames. Exchanging that list once is what forms the cluster agreement.
blocks.zh: MMSL 是 Multiple MAC Sublayers（多 MAC 子层）的缩写。关键工具是 MMS 元素（MMS element）：一段简短的通告，列出 MM-SME 所协调的全部 MAC 实体的 MAC 地址。STA 通过在（重）关联帧、ADDTS 帧、探测帧或信息帧中携带 MMS 元素，来宣告“这些地址都是我”。把这份清单交换一次，就形成了簇协议。

blocks.en: There are two ways to set a cluster up, and they use different frames. When a non-AP/non-PCP coordinated STA wants to cluster with an AP or PCP, the agreement rides on the Association Request/Response exchange. The STA puts its MMS element in the Association Request; if the AP is not itself MM-SME coordinated, it must echo that received MMS element back in the Association Response. If the AP is coordinated, it returns its own MMS element instead. Either way, the rule is blunt: if the Association Response carries no MMS element, the cluster setup fails.
blocks.zh: 建立簇有两种方式，使用的帧也不同。当一个非 AP/非 PCP 的被协调 STA 想与 AP 或 PCP 组簇时，协议搭载在关联请求/响应（Association Request/Response）交换上完成。STA 把自己的 MMS 元素放进关联请求；如果该 AP 本身不是被 MM-SME 协调的，它必须在关联响应里把收到的 MMS 元素原样回送。如果该 AP 是被协调的，它则改为回送自己的 MMS 元素。无论哪种情况，规则都很直接：如果关联响应里没有携带 MMS 元素，簇的建立就失败。

blocks.en: The second way joins two non-AP/non-PCP STAs directly to each other — peer to peer, no AP in the middle. That setup does not use association; it uses an ADDTS Request/Response exchange carrying a PTP (point-to-point) TSPEC. The originating STA includes its own MMS element in the ADDTS Request; the coordinated responder includes its own MMS element in the ADDTS Response. Same failure rule applies: no MMS element in the ADDTS Response means no cluster. And there is a guardrail — a STA that already formed an AID-identified cluster with its AP must not reuse an address outside its advertised MMS list to cluster with a peer on the same BSS.
blocks.zh: 第二种方式把两个非 AP/非 PCP 的 STA 直接连在一起——点对点，中间没有 AP。这种建立方式不使用关联，而是使用携带 PTP（点对点）TSPEC 的 ADDTS 请求/响应交换。发起方 STA 在 ADDTS 请求里放入自己的 MMS 元素；被协调的响应方在 ADDTS 响应里放入自己的 MMS 元素。同样的失败规则适用：ADDTS 响应里没有 MMS 元素就没有簇。这里还有一道护栏——一个已经与其 AP 建立了 AID 标识簇的 STA，不得使用其已通告的 MMS 清单之外的地址，去与同一 BSS 上的对端组簇。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
    participant STA as Non-AP coordinated STA
    participant AP as AP / PCP
    Note over STA: MM-SME lists its MAC entities
    STA->>AP: Association Request (MMS element = my MAC addresses)
    Note over AP: if not coordinated, echo received MMS;\nif coordinated, return own MMS
    AP->>STA: Association Response (MMS element)
    Note over STA,AP: MMS present -> MMSL cluster formed
    Note over STA,AP: MMS absent -> setup FAILS
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
    participant STA as 非AP被协调STA
    participant AP as AP / PCP
    Note over STA: MM-SME 列出其各 MAC 实体
    STA->>AP: 关联请求 (MMS 元素 = 我的各 MAC 地址)
    Note over AP: 若未被协调则回送收到的 MMS;\n若被协调则回送自身 MMS
    AP->>STA: 关联响应 (MMS 元素)
    Note over STA,AP: 含 MMS -> MMSL 簇建立
    Note over STA,AP: 缺 MMS -> 建立失败

blocks.en: Coordinating your own radios is half the story. The 60 GHz band is unlicensed and shared with non-Wi-Fi neighbours — most notably IEEE 802.15.3 systems. Clause 11.33 is about being a polite neighbour of a different species. A DMG AP should not even start an infrastructure BSS on a channel where the energy is already at or above a detection threshold (aDMGDetectionThres), or where it hears a valid 802.15.3 CMS preamble at –60 dBm or stronger. The shared 2.16 GHz channelization that other 60 GHz specs use is deliberately adopted by the DMG PHY, so everyone is on the same grid.
blocks.zh: 协调好自家的射频只是故事的一半。60 GHz 频段是免授权的，要与非 Wi-Fi 邻居共享——其中最典型的就是 IEEE 802.15.3 系统。11.33 节讲的就是如何做一个对“异类”邻居也彬彬有礼的存在。一个 DMG AP 不应在某信道上启动基础设施 BSS，如果该信道上的能量已达到或超过检测门限（aDMGDetectionThres），或在该信道上以 –60 dBm 或更强的电平听到了有效的 802.15.3 CMS 前导码。其他 60 GHz 规范所用的统一 2.16 GHz 信道划分被 DMG PHY 有意采纳，这样大家就都落在同一张栅格上。

blocks.en: When a DMG STA does detect a non-802.11 transmission (or its AP/PCP receives a measurement report about one), it has a whole toolbox of polite responses instead of just talking louder: change the operating channel, re-beamform away from the interferer, reduce transmit power, perform FST to another band, shift the TBTT/beacon interval, re-shape the SP and CBAP schedule, or simply defer transmission for later. Taking turns, not shouting.
blocks.zh: 当一个 DMG STA 确实检测到非 802.11 的传输（或其 AP/PCP 收到了关于此类传输的测量报告）时，它不是靠“嗓门更大”，而是有一整套礼貌的应对手段：更换工作信道、重新波束成形以避开干扰源、降低发射功率、执行 FST 切换到其他频段、移动 TBTT/信标间隔、重新安排 SP 与 CBAP 的调度，或者干脆把传输推迟到稍后。是轮流相让，而不是大声盖过对方。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 420 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><rect x='10' y='60' width='150' height='110' rx='8'/><text x='85' y='52' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>One STA (one MM-SME)</text><rect x='28' y='90' width='52' height='30' rx='4'/><text x='54' y='110' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle'>MAC 60GHz</text><rect x='95' y='90' width='52' height='30' rx='4'/><text x='121' y='110' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle'>MAC sub-7</text><text x='85' y='150' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>MMSL cluster</text><line x1='160' y1='105' x2='250' y2='105' stroke-dasharray='5 4'/><text x='205' y='98' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>MMS element</text><rect x='250' y='75' width='120' height='60' rx='8'/><text x='310' y='110' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='12' text-anchor='middle'>AP / PCP</text><rect x='250' y='10' width='160' height='34' rx='6' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><text x='330' y='31' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>802.15.3 neighbour (60GHz)</text><line x1='320' y1='44' x2='300' y2='75' stroke-dasharray='2 3'/><text x='372' y='58' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>coexist</text></svg>

caption.en: Two faces of DMG MAC management: inward, the MM-SME binds a device's own MAC entities into one MMSL cluster (advertised via the MMS element); outward, the DMG STA shares the 60 GHz band with non-802.11 neighbours like IEEE 802.15.3.
caption.zh: DMG MAC 管理的两个面向：对内，MM-SME 把一台设备自身的各 MAC 实体绑成一个 MMSL 簇（通过 MMS 元素通告）；对外，DMG STA 与 IEEE 802.15.3 等非 802.11 邻居共享 60 GHz 频段。

summary.en: The exact setup frames, the failure rule, and the coexistence start-up gate
summary.zh: 确切的建立帧、失败规则与共存启动门限

blocks.en: Clause 11.32.2.2 fixes the AP/PCP case: the Association Request/Response pair carries the MMS element; a non-coordinated AP/PCP must include the MMS element received from the non-AP/non-PCP MM-SME coordinated STA in its Association Response, while a coordinated AP/PCP includes its own MMS element and shall not echo the received one; an AP/PCP that is not MMSL cluster capable responds with no MMS element, and setup fails if the Association Response contains no MMS element. Clause 11.32.2.3 fixes the peer case: an ADDTS Request/Response exchange with a PTP TSPEC establishes the cluster between two non-AP/non-PCP STAs; the coordinated STA includes its own MMS element in transmitted ADDTS Request and Response frames, a non-coordinated responder may echo the originator's MMS element, and setup fails if the ADDTS Response contains no MMS element. Clause 11.33 sets the coexistence gate for the shared 60 GHz band: the DMG PHY adopts the common 2.16 GHz channelization; an AP should not start an infrastructure BSS on a channel where the signal is at or above aDMGDetectionThres or where a valid IEEE 802.15.3 CMS preamble is heard at >= -60 dBm; and on detecting a non-802.11 transmission a DMG STA may mitigate via channel change, beamforming, transmit-power reduction, FST, TBTT/beacon-interval move, SP/CBAP rescheduling, or deferral.
blocks.zh: 11.32.2.2 节确定了 AP/PCP 情形：关联请求/响应这一对帧携带 MMS 元素；未被协调的 AP/PCP 必须在其关联响应中包含从非 AP/非 PCP 的 MM-SME 被协调 STA 处收到的 MMS 元素，而被协调的 AP/PCP 则包含自己的 MMS 元素、且不得回送所收到的那个；不具备 MMSL 组簇能力的 AP/PCP 不回送任何 MMS 元素，且若关联响应不含 MMS 元素则建立失败。11.32.2.3 节确定了对端情形：使用携带 PTP TSPEC 的 ADDTS 请求/响应交换在两个非 AP/非 PCP STA 之间建立簇；被协调 STA 在所发送的 ADDTS 请求与响应帧中都包含自己的 MMS 元素，未被协调的响应方可回送发起方的 MMS 元素，且若 ADDTS 响应不含 MMS 元素则建立失败。11.33 节为共享的 60 GHz 频段设定了共存门限：DMG PHY 采纳统一的 2.16 GHz 信道划分；当某信道信号达到或超过 aDMGDetectionThres、或在该信道以 >= -60 dBm 听到有效的 IEEE 802.15.3 CMS 前导码时，AP 不应在该信道上启动基础设施 BSS；检测到非 802.11 传输时，DMG STA 可通过更换信道、波束成形、降低发射功率、FST、移动 TBTT/信标间隔、重排 SP/CBAP 调度或推迟传输来缓解干扰。

cites.note: 11.32.2.2 MMSL cluster setup of non-AP/non-PCP coordinated STA with AP/PCP (Association Req/Resp, MMS echo rule, failure if no MMS) and 11.32.2.3 setup between two non-AP/non-PCP STAs (ADDTS Req/Resp with PTP TSPEC)
11.33 DMG coexistence with non-IEEE-802.11 systems — common 2.16 GHz channelization, aDMGDetectionThres / -60 dBm 802.15.3 CMS preamble start-up gate, interference-mitigation toolbox
